channel.title: Data Science on Sarbhanu Baidya
channel.description: Recent content in Data Science on Sarbhanu Baidya

item.title: LinkedIn: Correlation vs. Causation?
item.description:
View on LinkedIn

Ever noticed how sometimes two things move in sync, but one doesn’t necessarily cause the other? 🤔 Here’s why we should dig deeper:

item.title: Web Application: BBC Reader
item.description:
View on Render

BBC Reader is a web-app that is built around the database which is being created by an automated data scraper. It is storing scraped data to MongoDB multiple times a day.

item.title: Web Application: Named Entity Recognizer
item.description:
View on Render

A web-app built using Flask to extract named entities from text.
